audit_items.proof_trace: Property expectation does not align with PeerDAS design. Block proposers publish ALL 128 data columns (L1031-1047) regardless of subscribed subnets, similar to how Deneb proposers publish all blobs (L1050-1065). Subscriptions determine which columns nodes store/custody (L1032-1042), not which they publish as proposers. This is correct PeerDAS behavior for data availability.
